description: Format the raw ECN draft at ~/Documents/ECN-2024-0847_draft.docx into a professionally formatted Engineering Change Notice for Precision Surgical Devices, Inc. and save it as ~/Documents/ECN-2024-0847_final.docx. The document must include a Document Control Header with the company name, title 'ENGINEERING CHANGE NOTICE', ECN Number 'ECN-2024-0847', Revision 'A', Date '2024-11-15', and Classification 'Class II Medical Device'. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the sections: Description of Change, Reason for Change, Affected Documents, Impact Assessment, Risk Assessment, Implementation Plan, and Approval Signatures. Convert prose data into five formatted tables with bold header rows: Affected Documents (Doc Number, Document Title, Current Rev, New Rev, Action Required), Impact Assessment (Category, Impact Level, Description), Risk Assessment (Risk Factor, Likelihood, Severity, Risk Level), Implementation Plan (Phase, Activity, Owner, Target Date, Status), and Approval Signatures (Role, Name, Signature, Date; leaving Signature and Date cells empty).
